decoder_heading: Privacy policy
ident_heading: Privacy policy
heading_content_part: Privacy policyPrivacy policyWifi password mastercom.magdalm.wifimasterpasswordWhen downloading or using the app, these policies will apply.The privacy policy details what types of information we collect, use, share and secure the information.It is not allowed to copy, modify or extract the source code of the application.We are committed to ensuring that the application is as efficient as possible. For that reason, we can make changes to the application.

decoder_heading: Use and security
ident_heading: Use and security
heading_content_part: Use and securityWe make sure to implement the necessary security measures, however we are not responsible for any loss, direct or indirect.It is your responsibility to keep your phone and access to the application safe. We advise you not to root your phone as it could make this app not work properly.

decoder_heading: Use and security
ident_heading: Use and security
heading_content_part: If you are using the application without a Wi-Fi connection, you should check the terms of the agreement with your mobile network provider so that no charges are applied due to data usage. Charges may also apply if you use the app outside your home territory (i.e. region or country) without turning off data roaming. If you are not the owner of the line of the device on which you are using the application, please note that we assume that you have received the owner\'s permission to use the application.

decoder_heading: Data transmissions
ident_heading: Data transmissions
heading_content_part: Data transmissionsAll data transmissions is encrypted in transit using the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol.

decoder_heading: What kind of file and data storage do we use?
ident_heading: What kind of file and data storage do we use?
heading_content_part: What kind of file and data storage do we use?We use preferences to store information for the operation of the application and personalization by the user. This data is stored in a private area of the application and is not collected or shared. As an additional security measure, when the user uninstalls the application, the device deletes this data.

decoder_heading: How do we use location permission?
ident_heading: How do we use location permission?
heading_content_part: How do we use location permission?The location permission is used only in the foreground, that is, while the application is in use.While using of this permission, we show the user information about the available Wi-Fi networks.This information is not collected or shared.

decoder_heading: Children's privacy
ident_heading: Children's privacy
heading_content_part: Children's privacyWe do not collect or share personal information from children under the age of 16.
